backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the CitizensCo CAppStores backend, defining data stores and endpoints for vendors, projects, reward campaigns, products, orders, user profiles, and Stripe payment integration with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, components, hooks, and styles for the CitizensCo CAppStores platform.
frontend/EXECUTION_PLAN.md: Phased implementation plan tracking frontend-backend integration progress across marketplace, wallet, rewards, discovery, dashboard, admin, and e-commerce features, with per-feature checklists and statuses.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the CitizensCo CAppStores frontend, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (marketplace, wallet, rewards, discovery, dashboard, admin, shop, orders, vendor, vendor directory, and vendor store) wrapped in a shared layout with header, footer, and theme provider.
frontend/src/components/AddDAppModal.tsx: Modal dialog component for submitting a new DApp to the marketplace, handling form state, logo file upload via ExternalBlob, and calling the addProjectEntry backend mutation.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel component with tabbed interface covering overview, analytics, revenue, wallets, rewards, advertising, and system health. Aggregates analytics and project data into summary stats and a detailed sortable table.
frontend/src/components/CreateRewardCamp: Modal dialog for creating a new reward campaign with fields for name, description, type, and reward amount. Submits via the useCreateRewardCampaign mutation and converts the amount to e8s.
frontend/src/components/DAppCard.tsx: Card component displaying a DApp's name, description, views, and clicks, with a Launch button that tracks click events via the useTrackProjectClick mutation. Automatically tracks a view on mount.
Static section displaying four platform feature cards (analytics, payments, AI recommendations, advertising) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing a copyright notice with a caffeine.ai attribution link and navigation links for About, Docs, and Support.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with logo, theme toggle, auth login/logout via Internet Identity, and navigation links to Shop, Orders, Vendor Dashboard, Wallet, Rewards, Discovery, and Dashboard (shown only when authenticated).
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Static hero banner with a gradient headline, subtitle, and three feature badge pills highlighting analytics, payments, and AI recommendations.
frontend/src/components/OrderDetailDialo: Dialog that displays full details of a specific order (ID, status, product, vendor, quantity, total, buyer principal, created date) looked up from the useGetOrders query by orderId.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects a user's name and optional email to create their profile, with field-level validation and error toasts.
frontend/src/components/RecommendationsP: Displays up to 3 AI-scored DApp recommendations based on view/click analytics, using a weighted scoring algorithm to surface underperforming or new projects.
frontend/src/components/RevenueDashboard: Shows mock revenue metrics (total revenue, payouts, active configs) and a per-DApp breakdown table using placeholder calculations against project entries.
frontend/src/components/RevenueShareConf: A modal form for creating a revenue share configuration with multiple participants (identified by principal or Stripe ID), validating that percentages sum to 100%.
frontend/src/components/StripeSetupModal: An admin-only modal that prompts for a Stripe secret key and allowed countries when Stripe is not yet configured, then saves the configuration via a mutation hook.
A combined text/voice input component that supports typing or browser-based speech recognition, submitting the resulting text via an onSubmit callback.
frontend/src/components/vendor/MyProduct: Displays a vendor's product listings in a card grid, showing name, description, price in ICP, stock badge, and creation date, with an empty state prompt to add the first product.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorCat: A controlled input component for managing a list of category tags with autocomplete suggestions, keyboard navigation, comma-separated parsing, duplicate detection, and removable badges.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorOnb: Renders a step-by-step onboarding checklist card for new vendors showing completion status of creating a vendor account and adding a first product; hides itself when all steps are complete.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPro: A form card that lets vendors create a new product by entering name, description, ICP price, and stock quantity, converting price to e8s before submitting via the useCreateProduct mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: Generic React hook that returns a debounced version of a given value, only updating after a configurable delay (default 300ms) has elapsed without further changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to manage login, logout, and identity state with status tracking for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyVendorProducts.t: Custom hook that fetches the current vendor and all products, then filters and returns only the products belonging to the current vendor along with loading state and a hasProducts flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including auth, user profiles, reward campaigns, products, orders, vendors, analytics, and project entries using the ICP actor pattern.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/DiscoveryHubPage.tsx: Page that displays trending, emerging, and leaderboard DApps using engagement scoring derived from analytics data, requiring authentication to view.
frontend/src/pages/GlobalDashboardPage.t: Unified analytics dashboard page showing platform-wide metrics including views, clicks, reward campaigns, and ad revenue, requiring authentication to access.
frontend/src/pages/MarketplacePage.tsx: Main marketplace page listing DApps with search, sort, and filter capabilities, plus admin panel access and profile setup modal for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Page that displays the authenticated user's order history in a table with status badges and a clickable detail dialog per order.
frontend/src/pages/RewardsPage.tsx: Displays reward campaigns with join/complete actions, showing campaign cards with type-specific icons and colors, organized in tabs, using React Query mutations for campaign participation.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Product browsing page that lists all vendor products with search and vendor filter, allowing authenticated users to place orders with quantity selection.
frontend/src/pages/VendorDirectoryPage.t: Public vendor directory with debounced search, category filtering, and sort controls, persisting filter state to URL params and fetching vendors via React Query.
frontend/src/pages/VendorPage.tsx: Vendor dashboard for authenticated users to register as a vendor, manage their profile/categories, view orders, withdraw balance, and manage products.
frontend/src/pages/VendorStorePage.tsx: Individual vendor storefront page that displays a specific vendor's profile and filtered product listings, allowing authenticated users to place orders.
frontend/src/pages/WalletPage.tsx: React page for a multi-currency wallet supporting ICP and fiat (Stripe) balances, with deposit/withdraw forms, transaction history display, and authentication gating.
frontend/src/types.ts: Frontend-only TypeScript type definitions for analytics, wallet, vendor, product, and order entities, supplementing backend-generated types.
frontend/src/utils/categoryText.ts: Utility functions for normalizing, comparing, parsing, and filtering vendor category strings in a case-insensitive, whitespace-normalized manner.
frontend/src/utils/errors.ts: Extracts a human-readable error message from various error types including Error objects, strings, and IC agent rejection objects.
frontend/src/utils/profileValidation.ts: Validation helpers for user profile name and email fields, enforcing length and format constraints that match backend rules.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup helpers.
frontend/src/utils/vendorDiscovery.ts: Utility functions for filtering vendors by multi-term search and category, sorting by name or date, and extracting unique normalized categories from a vendor list.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining OKLCH-based design tokens for colors, border radius, shadows, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file listing three pending feature requests: wiring live backend analytics to GlobalDashboardPage, replacing remaining mock data with React Query hooks, and applying UI polish across all pages.
